Name: Anemone
Behavior: Wanders slowly and creates a circle of projectiles around that move towards itself.

Name: Anglerfish
Behavior: Wanders slowly around until a player comes close, then will chase it charging up to 3 times before briefly stopping and charge again.

Name: Blobfish
Behavior: Slowly wanders around until killed, then spawns 4 Lampreys and a Sea Pig. If the last player weapon hit was done by a melee weapon, it spawns only 2 Lampreys.

Name: Clam
Behavior: Runs away if the player is too close, Fires a slow projectile that may directly target the player or somewhere near.

Name: Colossal Squid
Behavior: Closes in on the player and fires two crossing spikes toward them.

Name: Crab
Behavior: Closes in on the player and then fires a spike and moves backwards.

Name: Diplocaulus
Behavior: Slowly wanders the map leaving behind slasher eggs every few seconds.

Name: Dragonfish
Behavior: Shoots lines of bullets in the players direction

Name: Goblin Shark
Behavior: Charges to where the player is moving

Name: Hermit
Behavior: Wanders around and heals enemies

Name: Iron Lung
Behavior: Iron Lung is spawned by Stargazers, who will seek it out and enter it. After a few seconds of mutation (during which it bobs and turns red), a Dragonfish spawns.

Name: Lobster
Behavior: Chases the player and takes reduced damage from all sources.

Name: Looting Pig
Behavior: Runs around, drops a crate on death

Name: Narwhal
Behavior: Closes in on the player and can charge toward them, firing a spike in front of it.

Name: Plankton
Behavior: Chases the player and sometimes charges a small distance .

Name: Pufferfish
Behavior: Explodes into 10 projectiles when killed by non melee damage or when it dies after being charmed.

Name: Sea Pig
Behavior: Wanders around, drops a fair number of materials and gives 1 curse on death

Name: Shrimp
Behavior: Chases the character, deals damage on touch

Name: Stargazer
Behavior: Moves toward its Iron Lung, becomes buffed if its iron lung dies

Name: Stonefish
Behavior: Slowly wanders the map buffing enemies and spawning six projectiles around the player every few seconds. Buffed enemies gain +150% health, +25% damage, and +50% speed, and are outlined in red.

Name: Vampire Squid
Behavior: Chases the player while firing two projectiles in front of itself.

Name: Viperfish
Behavior: Starts growing after spawning, after a few seconds starts chasing the player.

Name: Walrus
Behavior: Charges towards the player every few seconds.
